title: UPI Circle Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for delegated UPI payments via UPI Circle (NPCI delegation framework). The buyer has pre-authorized the platform to initiate payments on their behalf within configurable per-transaction and monthly limits, without requiring per-transaction MPIN authentication. Analogous to a card-on-file for India's UPI payment rail.

type.description: Discriminator identifying this as a UPI Circle (delegated UPI) payment instrument.

delegate_id.description: Persistent identifier for the buyer's active UPI Circle delegation mandate. Obtained during one-time delegation setup with the platform's UPI TSP (e.g., Razorpay AI Commerce TSP). This reference is used to fetch a per-transaction cryptogram before Complete Checkout.

display.description: Display information for rendering this UPI Circle instrument in platform UI.

name.description: Human-readable label for platform UI (e.g., 'UPI Autopay', 'Delegated UPI').

logo.description: HTTPS URI to the UPI logo for display in platform UI.

delegator_name.description: Display name of the buyer who authorized the delegation mandate (e.g., 'Rohit S.').

masked_vpa.description: Partially masked VPA (Virtual Payment Address) of the delegating buyer for display purposes (e.g., 'roh***@icici'). Must not expose the full VPA.
